channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: 6th Marine Battalion and Cotabato City Police repel armed attackers at Timako Hill
item.description: On April 4, 2026, personnel from the 6th Marine Battalion, in coordination with the Cotabato City Police Office, successfully drove away a group of armed men who attacked two locals gathering firewood...

item.title: Delhi Police detain Uttar Pradesh youth for terror-related investigation; past ISIS links examined
item.description: Delhi Police's Special Cell has detained a young man from Padrauna in Kushinagar district, Uttar Pradesh, over suspicions of involvement in terrorist activities. The youth, identified as Rizwan Ahmed,...

item.title: Joyous Celebration directors in financial dispute ahead of 30th anniversary tour
item.description: The directors of Joyous Celebration, one of South Africa’s leading gospel choirs, are embroiled in a legal dispute over alleged financial mismanagement. Co-director Lindelani Mkhize has accused his pa...

item.title: BJP in West Bengal to Focus on PM Modi Instead of Naming CM Candidate
item.description: West Bengal BJP president Samik Bhattacharya has clarified that the party has not yet decided on a chief ministerial candidate for the upcoming state elections. Instead, the BJP plans to campaign by l...

item.title: PMD Forecasts Widespread Heavy Rain and Thunderstorms Across Pakistan from April 5 to 9
item.description: According to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD), a fresh western disturbance is expected to hit Pakistan from April 5 till April 9, bringing heavy rains, thunderstorms, windstorms, and hail ...

item.title: President Samia to Attend National Conference for Food Vendors in Tanzania
item.description: Tanzania's President Samia Suluhu Hassan is set to be the guest of honor at a national conference gathering food vendors from all over the country on April 11, 2026, at the Julius Nyerere Internationa...

item.title: London Police Arrest Additional Suspect in Arson Attack on Jewish Ambulances
item.description: London police have apprehended another suspect in connection with the arson attack on ambulances operated by the Jewish charity Hatzola. The incident occurred on March 23 in the Golders Green area, a ...

item.title: Raghav Chadha Rejects Claims of Neglecting Punjab Issues in Parliament
item.description: Raghav Chadha, Member of Parliament from the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP), has strongly refuted allegations that he failed to raise Punjab-related concerns in the Parliament. According to him, these accusati...

item.title: Senator Lacson warns of P320-B revenue loss if VAT suspension proceeds
item.description: Senator Panfilo Lacson has raised concerns that the Philippines could lose over P320 billion in government revenue if the value-added tax (VAT) is suspended, warning that such a move may negatively im...

item.title: Pedro Taduran keeps IBF title, Jimuel Pacquiao secures first professional victory
item.description: Filipino boxing champion Pedro Taduran successfully defended his IBF minimumweight title by knocking out Mexican contender Gustavo Perez Alvarez in the seventh round at Pechanga Resort Casino, Temecul...

item.title: PCO urges public to avoid spreading false information on energy amid fuel price hikes
item.description: The Presidential Communications Office (PCO) has issued a warning to Filipinos against circulating false information regarding energy supply, pricing, or security. This comes as fuel prices continue t...

item.title: Medicine Hat Tigers rally from three goals down to eliminate Regina Pats in overtime
item.description: In an intense Western Hockey League matchup, the Medicine Hat Tigers staged a remarkable comeback against the Regina Pats in Game 5 of the series. Facing a three-goal deficit, the Tigers rallied in th...

item.title: Pakistan clarifies UAE deposits return is routine financial transaction
item.description: The Foreign Office of Pakistan has clarified on Saturday that reports about the repayment of UAE debt are misleading and without basis. Pakistan is set to return deposits placed by the UAE with the St...

item.title: Knorr Provides Free Meals and WiFi in Churches and Public Transport Across Nigeria This Easter
item.description: Dis Easter weekend, from April 3 to 6, 2026, Knorr dey spread joy all over Naija by giving free, hot, nutritious meals and WiFi access to people. Di initiative cover plenty states including Lagos, Oyo...

item.title: Exploring Cyprus's Divided Territories and the UN Buffer Zone
item.description: The article recounts a journey through the complex and historically divided island of Cyprus. The author describes crossing the Green Line, a UN-controlled buffer zone separating the internationally r...

item.title: Iran Clarifies Position on Islamabad Talks, Stresses Terms and Conditions
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has clarified that Iran has not refused to participate in talks in Islamabad, countering reports suggesting otherwise. He stressed that Tehran’s involvement in ...

item.title: Morning Fog Reduces Visibility in Istanbul
item.description: On the morning of April 5, 2026, Istanbul experienced significant fog that reduced visibility across various parts of the city. The fog was particularly dense in higher areas, including the Fatih Sult...

item.title: Palaniswami responds to Karunanidhi house arrest allegations; Stalin rejects claims
item.description: In the lead-up to the Tamil Nadu assembly elections scheduled for April 23, former Chief Minister and AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K Palaniswami addressed a viral audio clip controversy involving...

item.title: Mwanza Police Arrest Six Drivers for Drunk Driving, Suspend Licences
item.description: Mwanza Regional Police have taken serious action against reckless driving after arresting six drivers for driving under the influence of alcohol. The arrests, announced by Mwanza Regional Police Comma...

item.title: US Airman Rescued from Iranian Territory Following Intense Military Operation
item.description: A second US airman has been rescued after a US fighter jet was downed over Iran, according to President Donald Trump. The operation, described as one of the most daring search and rescue missions in U...
